context: Tests whether the agent implements per-channel LRU dedup keyed by message_id (with timetoken fallback), processes the catch-up before subscribing live, and structures the merge in the documented order.

checklist.name: LRU has and add
checklist.description: LRU class exposes has(key) and add(key); has returns false for missing, true for present; add inserts and evicts the oldest when size > max

checklist.name: LRU default max 10000
checklist.description: LRU default max is 10000 when no argument is provided

checklist.name: LRU updates recency
checklist.description: Either has() or add() updates the key's recency so that re-touched keys are NOT the next ones evicted (e.g., delete-and-reset in the Map order)

checklist.name: createDedupRegistry per-channel LRU
checklist.description: createDedupRegistry maintains one LRU per channel (lazily created), and the same key on two different channels does NOT dedup across them

checklist.name: fetchMessages used for catch-up
checklist.description: mergeHistoryThenSubscribe calls pubnub.fetchMessages (not pubnub.history) with channels: [channel] and count <= 100

checklist.name: Catch-up processed before live
checklist.description: The fetchMessages call (awaited) completes BEFORE pubnub.subscribe is called in the function's control flow

checklist.name: Dedup key prefers message_id
checklist.description: Both the catch-up loop and the live listener compute the dedup key as message.message_id ?? message.timetoken (or equivalent — message_id first, timetoken fallback)

checklist.name: Live listener dedups before calling onMessage
checklist.description: The live message listener does the same has → add → onMessage flow as the catch-up loop, so messages already seen via catch-up are filtered

checklist.name: Subscribe called after listener attached
checklist.description: pubnub.subscribe is called AFTER addListener so the listener is in place when the first live message arrives

checklist.name: Comment on order
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states catch-up runs FIRST then subscribe live, and notes order matters

checklist.name: Comment on per-channel registry
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states the dedup registry is per-channel and that a single global set would conflate streams
